recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.

recommendations.title: 1000 Miles From Christmas
recommendations.overview: An auditor who completely despises Christmas is sent to a small town for work, where he meets a woman determined to change his view about the holiday.

recommendations.title: Just Another Christmas
recommendations.overview: After taking a very nasty fall on Christmas Eve, grinchy Jorge blacks out and wakes up one year later, with no memory of the year that has passed. He soon realizes that he’s doomed to keep waking up on Christmas Eve after Christmas Eve, having to dea

recommendations.title: Emma.
recommendations.overview: In 1800s England, a well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends.

recommendations.title: That Christmas
recommendations.overview: It's an unforgettable Christmas for the townsfolk of Wellington-on-Sea when the worst snowstorm in history alters everyone's plans — including Santa's.

recommendations.title: Package Tour
recommendations.overview: Stig-Helmer and Ole Bramserud on a trip to the Canary Islands for Christmas.

recommendations.title: A Christmas Miracle for Daisy
recommendations.overview: Whitney Alder owns interior design firm Marietta Designs, which she runs with her friend Andi in the small town of Marietta, Montana. Whitney is designing Santa’s float for the annual Marietta Christmas Parade when a potential job opportunity comes h

recommendations.title: The Smurfs: A Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: When Grouchy Smurf behaves badly to everyone and refuses to celebrate Christmas, the Smurfs of Christmas Past, Present and Future teach him to appreciate Christmas.

recommendations.title: Jingle Bell Heist
recommendations.overview: Two down-on-their-luck hourly workers team up to rob a posh London department store on Christmas Eve. Will they steal each other's hearts along the way?

recommendations.title: Noel
recommendations.overview: With Christmas Eve just around the corner in bustling New York, five lonely and sad strangers find their lives inadvertently intersected.
